title: Better PvP by Damiann
description: Never lose with these pvp essentials.
body:
A resource pack that should make your life easier.


 What this resource pack do?
- Smaller utils
- Low fire
- Low totem pop
- No explosion particles
- Darker GUI
- No Crystal Sounds
- And more!


YouTube Preview:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LAb9TMn9_lY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



This is everything I've been looking for since I started experimenting with pvp, in a single resourcepack.


If anyone wants to collaborate, maybe for a more complex Resource Pack, my discord is D4my#3484
